Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 5 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}M-My side is killing me... I might've overdone it a bit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 5 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'm not giving up yet. I can keep going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 8 5 105}Easy for you to say... But honestly, you're probably onto something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}How 'bout you? You okay? You've really been pushing it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}You don't even look tired... Uh, what kind of training regimen do you have?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You say that like it's no big deal. Meanwhile I'm dying over here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I figured as much. Else I wouldn't be dying over here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It kinda sucks... You totally destroyed me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I knew the standards were high around here, but I never thought someone so good would be right in front of me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 2 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Listen up, {f 4 1}! I'm gonna make you eat my dust![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Miyamoto sees me as a rival.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Sorry, I didn't mean to get so worked up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 5 151 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I think I might've... twisted my knee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Miyamoto[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
